command.description: encrypt entries in a zip archive

options.description: show a short help for zipcloak
decrypt encrypted entries (copy if given wrong password)

value.name: zipfile

options.description: quiet operation. Suppresses some informational messages
write output to new archive zipfile, leaving original archive as is

value.name: zipfile
value.description: New zipfile that will be written to

options.description: use the directory given by path for the temporary zip file
